class.name: MultiNodeInstanceData
class.brief_description: Serializable snapshot of instance transforms and optional custom data for MultiNode.
class.description: MultiNodeInstanceData stores an array of Transform3D and an optional flat PackedFloat32Array for per-instance custom data. Save as .tres or .res and assign to a MultiNodeInstanceGen's gen_instance_data property to load instances from a saved snapshot. Use the "Save Instance Data" button on MultiNodeInstanceGen to create snapshots.

members.member: Array of Transform3D, one per saved instance.
Optional flat float array for per-instance custom data. Length should be instance_count * data_stride.

method.name: get_instance_count
method.description: Returns the number of instances stored in this resource (transforms array size).
